name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hidden File or Folder Created
notes:
This Building Block triggers when a hidden file or folder is created. A hidden file or folder can take three forms:
- Start with a dot
- Start with a dot and contain a space
- Permissions based (ie -rwx------)
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hidden File or Folder Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches ("Filename" is not NULL and Filename not in ('.viminfo')) OR "Encoded Filename" is not NULL AQL filter query
when the event matches "Filename" MATCHES '^(.*\/)*\..*' OR "Encoded Filename" MATCHES '^((.{2})*2F)*2E.*' OR "File Permissions" MATCHES '\d?(12|10|04)0\d00' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hidden File or Folder Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches ("Filename" is not NULL and Filename not in ('.viminfo')) OR "Encoded Filename" is not NULL AQL filter query
AND when the event matches "Filename" MATCHES '^(.*\/)*\..*' OR "Encoded Filename" MATCHES '^((.{2})*2F)*2E.*' OR "File Permissions" MATCHES '\d?(12|10|04)0\d00' AQL filter query
